note: seq=120: CHANNEL-1 SAME-DAY counter + NRD revival. (1) atlas_channel1_freshcount.py queries atlas.business.first_seen directly -> REAL same-day new-business counts (today/yesterday/7d-trend + by-source NRD vs SoS/CT) -> channel1.json; 30-min timer. (2) NRD daily timer (OnCalendar 09:30 UTC) revived + qualify cap RAISED 8k->20k (qualify more of the daily ~70k) + run now. (3) re-kick osm-xref (didn't publish first run). All verified-complete + compile-clean.

steps.note: seq=120: channel-1 same-day counter + NRD daily revival (cap 20k) + xref re-kick.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; p='/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_channel1_freshcount.py'; h=hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest(); sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+h) if h!='73c7d6c6754d2b6a160245310cd6268c9573d149eb2f7a69aa96292f931a4cc2' else print('ch1 sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Channel-1 same-day fresh-business counter
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=10
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_channel1_freshcount.py
TimeoutStartSec=300
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=20

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS Channel-1 counter every 30min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=30min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS NRD newly-registered-domain collector (Channel-1)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=12
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=NRD_QUALIFY_CAP=20000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_nrd_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=1800
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=120

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS NRD daily

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 09:30:00 UTC
OnBootSec=5min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); [ (s.run(['systemctl','enable',t]), s.run(['systemctl','start',t])) for t in ['atlas-channel1.timer','atlas-nrd.timer'] ]; [ (s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed',u]), s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block',u])) for u in ['atlas-channel1.service','atlas-nrd.service','atlas-osm-xref.service'] ]; print('channel1+nrd+xref kicked')"
